decision.reason: Short Mean Reversion into a strong bullish tape (83.3); higher-TF bullish with no turn confirmation. Knife-catch — stand aside; the long is the tape-aligned trade.

candlestick_patterns.description: Shooting Star — long upper shadow, bearish reversal signal
Bullish Harami — small bullish bar inside prior bearish body
Inside Bar — compression; breakout direction = next move
Doji — indecision, potential reversal

Pin Bar — strong rejection of highs
Bearish Engulfing — sellers completely overwhelmed buyers
